title: Invalid Heap Operations Result in Incorrect Binomial Heap

statement.markdown: Solve the problem and fix the bugs.
statement.inputFormat: 1st line: n, 2nd line: array of operations and values (e.g. insert/delete/min/max)
statement.outputFormat: 1st line: min/root value of final heap, 2nd line: max/root value of final heap
statement.notes: Time and space complexity: O(log n), where n is size of array. Note that binomial heap has O(1) deleteMin operation.

editorial.title: Invalid Heap Operations Result in Incorrect Binomial Heap

functionSignature.java: public boolean solve(int m, int[] arr);
